expectations.desc: For a narrated job (JTBD-1/4) with TTS reachable, artifacts/<project>/assets/vo/narration.wav exists and is non-empty (one continuous track from a single ai-gen Kokoro TTS call). Absent + silent-fallback recorded in state.md when TTS is unreachable, or for a JTBD-3 clip-in (ASR-only) job.

artifacts/<project>/04-timing.json exists with a flat top-level words[] (each {text,start,end} in seconds, optional beat tag) and a beats[] (each {beat,wav,duration,timing_method,words[]}); times are monotonic and total_duration covers the whole track. @remotion/captions-shaped in seconds (rm-captions converts ×1000).

Every beat carries a timing_method of wizper | even | estimated; when Wizper returns no per-word timestamps the method is even/estimated (never fabricated word times), and the chosen method is reported and written to state.md phase 4.

The run is keyless via ai-gen (fal-ai/kokoro/american-english TTS + fal-ai/wizper ASR) — no ElevenLabs/HeyGen auth and no user prompt; on success:false it takes the documented silent/estimated fallback rather than failing the project.
